title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: SHUTE PARK LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Additional services may be offered. 775 SE Tenth Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-8pm, Friday-Sunday 10am-6pm (506) 616-6500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (506) 616-6500 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SHUTE PARK LIBRARY
